title: Ice Turns the Mood Cold
description: Aokiji’s connection to Nico Robin and Ohara turns the encounter into a threat aimed directly at the crew’s newest member.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this scene focuses on Sanji, Luffy, Aokiji, Nico Robin, Zoro. Aokiji’s connection to Nico Robin and Ohara turns the encounter into a threat aimed directly at the crew’s newest member.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What do you think you are doing...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Don't save a woman like her.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Thanks for the suggestion, but no thanks.

summary: Aokiji’s connection to Nico Robin and Ohara turns the encounter into a threat aimed directly at the crew’s newest member.
